item.description:

# theba.sh - June 4, 2026
*32 sources · ranked by impact · automated fallback edition assembled from ranked source feeds (model request failed)*
---
## stdout // the big story
### Here is Everything Microsoft announced at Microsoft Build 2026 *[tool]* - Microsoft used Build 2026 to show how agents move from chat windows into PCs, Windows, GitHub, Azure, enterprise data, and new hardware. In other words: Microsoft is giving agents a whole computer to live in.
- Why it matters: Microsoft

## stdout // the big story
### Polymarket May 31, 2026: The $8.2B Prediction Market That Predicted Everything *[policy]* - Polymarket May 31, 2026: The $8.2B Prediction Market That Predicted Everything The prediction market hit a new milestone today: $8.2 billion in active bets. But here's what matters: the money isn't spread evenly. Smart
